name: Hirey Tasks
description: Inbox-zero for Hirey Hi. Drowning in inbound? Hirey Tasks turns the messages, meeting requests and matches that land in your Hi inbox into one managed, prioritized task list — auto-captured and LLM-distilled into a recipient-facing title with a type (question / request / meeting / lead / bug / fyi) and priority, then triageable with one click (done / drop / snooze / delegate). Set rules to auto-label, auto-prioritize or auto-route, and get a batched digest instead of 40 interruptions. It's a parallel overlay: turning a message into a task never touches your conversations. Self-hosts in one command against the live Hi REST API; sign in with Google / email / phone — no key to paste.
author: Hirey
